query:
UPDATE videoCharacters
SET masterPortraitUrl = previewImageUrl,
    updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE id = 390001
  AND jobId = 510025
  AND masterPortraitUrl IS NULL
  AND previewImageUrl IS NOT NULL;
command:
